hero.title: Productized Sovereign Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Deterministic systems designed, built, and deployed — not pitched. Every engagement is scoped to eliminate ambiguity and deliver measurable institutional outcomes.

tiers.name: Architecture Sprint
tiers.description: End-to-end architecture design for blockchain infrastructure, tokenized capital systems, AI operating environments, or multi-chain settlement layers. Delivered as a deterministic blueprint with implementation roadmap.
tiers.ideal: Institutions, funds, or protocols building sovereign infrastructure from zero

tiers.name: Token Design Sprint
tiers.description: Custom token architecture including economic modeling, supply mechanics, governance structures, and multi-chain deployment strategy. Built with Genesis Protocol-grade simulation methodology.
tiers.priceNote: Based on token complexity & chain count
tiers.ideal: DeFi protocols, RWA issuers, or institutional token launches

tiers.name: RWA Structuring
tiers.description: Institutional-grade structuring for real-world asset tokenization — including compliance mapping, custody integration, settlement architecture, and multi-jurisdiction regulatory alignment.
tiers.ideal: Fund managers, family offices, or institutional issuers tokenizing real-world assets

tiers.name: Strategic Consulting
tiers.description: Monthly retainer for ongoing strategic infrastructure advisory — architecture reviews, protocol governance, technical due diligence, and systems optimization across blockchain and AI stacks.
tiers.ideal: Protocols, DAOs, or institutions needing continuous sovereign systems advisory

tiers.name: KAIROS AI Licensing
tiers.description: Enterprise licensing of the KAIROS AI infrastructure stack — including agentic RAG, document intelligence, voice AI runtime, and MCP marketing infrastructure. White-label or embedded deployment.
tiers.ideal: Enterprises deploying AI operating environments at scale

tiers.name: FTH Certification Program
tiers.description: Structured certification pathway for engineers and architects seeking mastery in deterministic infrastructure design — covering blockchain settlement, AI systems, tokenization, and sovereign architecture.
tiers.ideal: Engineers, architects, or teams upskilling in sovereign infrastructure

enterprise.title: Enterprise & Institutional Licensing
enterprise.description: For organizations requiring dedicated infrastructure deployment, custom SLAs, and white-glove architecture support.

cta.title: Ready to Build Deterministic Infrastructure?
cta.subtitle: Every engagement starts with a scoping call. No ambiguity, no surprise invoices — just precisely architected outcomes.
